title: nb-meta
description: Documentation-only reference shape for an article's nb-meta JSON block. The authoritative validator is engine/check.py (the proof); no engine code loads this file, and some constraints here (maxLength, number bounds) are advisory rather than enforced. Keep it in sync with the proof by hand.

template.description: a template id from the merged template packages (shipped or press-defined)

order.description: position within a collection or sequence; null for rolling and open, where the publication date is the order
